title: New Zealand API Standard
description: Normative specification for New Zealand government agencies developing, deploying, and operating APIs. Consolidates three NZ API Guideline documents (Parts A, B, C) into a single standard covering design, development, security, deployment, and operations of REST APIs.

source.page_title: The New Zealand API Standard | Version: exposuredraft
